property.name: fieldApiName
property.label: Field API Name
property.description: API name of the picklist field to use for the path (e.g., StageName)

property.name: groupingLabel
property.label: Grouping Label
property.description: Label to group picklist values under

property.name: allowHideKeyFieldsAndGuidance
property.label: Allow Users To Collapse Key Fields and Guidance
property.description: Allow users to collapse the key fields and guidance panel

property.name: preventBackwardsMovement
property.label: Prevent Backwards Movement
property.description: Prevent users from moving the path backwards
